body:
## Code Review

ADR-047 に基づくプラグイン可能なエンジンレジストリの実装と、アンサンブル戦略（BestScore, Weighted）の追加を確認しました。Stockfish 16.0.0 の統合や SRI ハッシュの導入など、セキュリティと品質の向上が図られています。一方で、レジストリの解決ロジックにおいてアダプター型が欠落している点や、重み付き戦略の実装が不完全である点など、いくつか改善が必要な箇所が見受けられます。特に EngineBridge におけるアダプター型の推論ロジックは、プロトコルベースのアダプター利用において不具合を招く可能性があるため、優先的な修正を推奨します。

**Actionable comments posted: 7** > [!CAUTION] > Some comments are outside the diff and can’t be posted inline due to platform limitations. > > > >
> ⚠️ Outside diff range comments (1)
> >
> packages/registry/src/index.ts (1)
> > `28-33`: _⚠️ Potential issue_ | _🟠 Major_ > > **`versionEntry["assets"]` に対する null ガードが欠落しており `undefined` が漏出します** > > Line 33 の `return versionEntry["assets"] as Record` は、`assets` キーが存在しない場合に `undefined` を返しますが、戻り値型は `Record | null` と宣言されています。`RemoteRegistry` が不正なマニフェストをロードした場合、呼び出し元の `=== null` チェックをすり抜けてダウンストリームで予期せぬエラーを引き起こします。 > >
> 🐛 修正案 > > ```diff > - return versionEntry["assets"] as Record; > + const assets = versionEntry["assets"]; > + if (assets == null) return null; > + return assets as Record; > ``` >
> >
> 🤖 Prompt for AI Agents > > ``` > Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed. > > In `@packages/registry/src/index.ts` around lines 28 - 33, versionEntry["assets"] > can be undefined and currently escapes the declared return type; update the code > around versions / targetVersion handling (the versionEntry lookup and the > return) to explicitly guard for a missing or falsy versionEntry["assets"] before > casting to Record and return null when assets is > absent; ensure you reference the same symbols (versions, targetVersion, > versionEntry, assets, IEngineSourceConfig) and only return a typed Record when > assets is present and valid. > ``` > >
> >
> >
🧹 Nitpick comments (6)
packages/adapter-ensemble/src/strategies/BestScoreStrategy.ts (1)
`48-48`: **`||` より `??`（Nullish Coalescing）が意味的に正確です。** `bestResult` は `T_RESULT | null` 型であり、`||` は falsy 値全般にマッチします。`null` チェックのみが目的であれば `??` を使用するとインテントが明確になります。
♻️ 提案 ```diff - return bestResult || results[0]!; + return bestResult ?? results[0]!; ```
🤖 Prompt for AI Agents ``` Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed. In `@packages/adapter-ensemble/src/strategies/BestScoreStrategy.ts` at line 48, Replace the usage of the logical OR with a nullish coalescing operator: the current return expression using bestResult || results[0]! should be changed so only null/undefined are considered falls-back — update the return to use bestResult ?? results[0]! (in the BestScoreStrategy implementation where bestResult is typed as T_RESULT | null and results is the array). ```
packages/core/src/bridge/__tests__/EngineBridge.test.ts (1)
`137-194`: **プライベートメソッドを直接テストしており、内部実装に依存した脆弱なテストになっています。** `resolveEngineConfig` はプライベートメソッドのため、型キャストによるアクセスはリファクタリング時に壊れやすいです。LIFO 解決の挙動を公開 API（例：モックローダーを使った `registerAdapter` + `getEngine` の組み合わせ）経由でテストすることを検討してください。 また、Line 138 および Line 168 のテスト関数は `async` で宣言されていますが、内部に `await` がありません。`async` は不要です。
♻️ async 修正の提案 ```diff - it("should resolve metadata from the most recently added registry", async () => { + it("should resolve metadata from the most recently added registry", () => { ``` ```diff - it("should fallback to earlier registries if not found in recent ones", async () => { + it("should fallback to earlier registries if not found in recent ones", () => { ```
🤖 Prompt for AI Agents ``` Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed. In `@packages/core/src/bridge/__tests__/EngineBridge.test.ts` around lines 137 - 194, The tests are touching the private method resolveEngineConfig via type-cast and declare unnecessary async; instead exercise the LIFO behavior through the public API: use EngineBridge.addRegistry to register mock registries and then call the public retrieval flow (e.g., registerAdapter + getEngine or the bridge's public getEngine-like method) to assert the chosen source URL and that only the expected registry.resolve was invoked; also remove the unused async keyword from the two it blocks. Locate usages of resolveEngineConfig, addRegistry, and the test it blocks to implement these changes. ```
packages/adapter-ensemble/src/strategies/__tests__/WeightedStrategy.test.ts (1)
`5-18`: **エッジケースのテストが不足しています。** 以下のテストケースを追加することを推奨します： 1. **空配列の投入で `EngineError`（`VALIDATION_ERROR`）がスローされること** 2. **`bestMove` が `undefined` の結果が混在しても、有効な手が正しく選ばれること**（WeightedStrategy.ts の `String(undefined)` 問題とも関連） 3. **同票の場合のタイブレーク挙動**
♻️ 追加テストの例 ```diff + it("should throw EngineError when results are empty", () => { + const strategy = new WeightedStrategy(); + expect(() => strategy.aggregateResults([])).toThrow(); + }); + + it("should ignore results with undefined bestMove", () => { + const strategy = new WeightedStrategy(); + const results: IBaseSearchResult[] = [ + { bestMove: undefined }, + { bestMove: "a2a3" }, + { bestMove: "a2a3" }, + ]; + const winner = strategy.aggregateResults(results); + expect(winner.bestMove).toBe("a2a3"); + }); ```
🤖 Prompt for AI Agents ``` Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed. In `@packages/adapter-ensemble/src/strategies/__tests__/WeightedStrategy.test.ts` around lines 5 - 18, Add three unit tests for WeightedStrategy.aggregateResults: (1) call aggregateResults([]) and assert it throws an EngineError with type VALIDATION_ERROR; (2) pass results containing some entries with bestMove undefined and assert the function still returns a valid bestMove (ensure aggregateResults skips/ignores undefined rather than using String(undefined)); (3) create a results array that produces an exact vote tie and assert the tie-break deterministic behavior (document expected winner) so the test verifies the current tie-break logic. Reference WeightedStrategy.aggregateResults and EngineError/VALIDATION_ERROR when adding assertions and ensure the implementation treats undefined bestMove values safely. ```
packages/adapter-ensemble/src/strategies/__tests__/BestScoreStrategy.test.ts (1)
`5-27`: **エッジケースのテストが不足しています。** 以下の重要なケースがカバーされていません： 1. **空配列 → `EngineError`（`VALIDATION_ERROR`）のスロー** 2. **全結果に `score` フィールドがない場合 → `results[0]` にフォールバックされること** 3. **`cp` と `winrate` が混在する場合に `cp` が優先されること**
♻️ 追加テストの例 ```diff + it("should throw EngineError when results are empty", () => { + const strategy = new BestScoreStrategy(); + expect(() => strategy.aggregateResults([])).toThrow(); + }); + + it("should return first result when no score field is present", () => { + const strategy = new BestScoreStrategy(); + const results: IBaseSearchResult[] = [ + { bestMove: "a2a3" }, + { bestMove: "a2a4" }, + ]; + const winner = strategy.aggregateResults(results); + expect(winner.bestMove).toBe("a2a3"); + }); + + it("should prefer cp over winrate when both are present", () => { + const strategy = new BestScoreStrategy(); + const results: IBaseSearchResult[] = [ + { bestMove: "a2a3", score: { cp: 100 } }, + { bestMove: "a2a4", score: { winrate: 0.99 } }, // cp undefined → winrate used + ]; + const winner = strategy.aggregateResults(results); + expect(winner.bestMove).toBe("a2a3"); + }); ```
🤖 Prompt for AI Agents ``` Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed. In `@packages/adapter-ensemble/src/strategies/__tests__/BestScoreStrategy.test.ts` around lines 5 - 27, Add tests covering three missing edge cases for BestScoreStrategy.aggregateResults: (1) assert that calling aggregateResults([]) throws an EngineError with code VALIDATION_ERROR; (2) when none of the IBaseSearchResult entries contain a score field, assert the method returns the first element (results[0]) as the fallback; and (3) when entries mix cp and winrate fields, assert entries with cp are preferred over winrate (i.e., cp comparison wins). Use the existing BestScoreStrategy class and IBaseSearchResult shape and assert error code/value against EngineError.VALIDATION_ERROR or equivalent constant when validating the empty-array case. ```
packages/registry/src/index.ts (1)
`72-76`: **ライブラリコードに `console.warn` を直接使用しないでください** プロダクションライブラリが `console.warn` を直接呼び出すと、呼び出し元のアプリケーションがログ出力を制御できなくなります。プロジェクトの共通ロガー抽象（例：`@multi-game-engines/logger`）を使用するか、`RemoteRegistry` のコンストラクタでオプションの `logger` を受け取るパターンに変更することを推奨します。
🤖 Prompt for AI Agents ``` Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed. In `@packages/registry/src/index.ts` around lines 72 - 76, The code uses console.warn inside RemoteRegistry.resolve (or wherever the check for this.loaded occurs); change RemoteRegistry to accept an optional logger in its constructor (or import the project logger abstraction like `@multi-game-engines/logger`) and replace console.warn calls with logger.warn so callers can control logging; ensure the constructor stores the logger (e.g., this.logger) and the resolve method uses this.logger.warn (falling back to a no-op or console if no logger provided) and update any tests/instantiations to pass the logger where needed. ```

♻️ アサーション強化案 ```diff expect(mockLoader.loadResources).toHaveBeenCalledWith( "stockfish", expect.objectContaining({ - main: expect.objectContaining({ url: "custom-stockfish.js" }), + main: expect.objectContaining({ + url: "custom-stockfish.js", + sri: "sha384-SetCorrectHashHereToSatisfySecurityAudit0123456789ABCDEF01234567", + type: "worker-js", + }), }), ); ```

Inline comments: In `@packages/adapter-ensemble/src/strategies/BestScoreStrategy.ts`: - Around line 22-28: The EngineError creation in BestScoreStrategy (the block that checks results.length === 0) uses a hardcoded English message; replace the hardcoded message with a localized string lookup from the project's locales (or explicitly mark it as a dev-only fallback) and pass that into the EngineError message field while keeping the existing i18nKey (EngineErrorCode.VALIDATION_ERROR, i18nKey: "adapters.ensemble.errors.noResults"); update the code to call the appropriate i18n accessor used across the codebase (e.g., i18n.t / translate / getLocaleString) to populate message so no user-facing English is hardcoded. after await response.json(), treat the result as unknown and validate it against a runtime schema (e.g., a Zod schema or equivalent validator you add) before assigning to this.data — if validation fails, throw a descriptive error instead of casting; packages/registry/data/engines.json (1)
`33-39`: _⚠️ Potential issue_ | _🟠 Major_ **`sri` フィールドの完全削除は前回フィードバックへの対応として不十分です** 前回のレビューコメントで「プレースホルダー SRI ハッシュを実際の SHA-384 値に置き換えるよう」指摘されましたが、対応として `sri` フィールドそのものが削除されています。これにより整合性検証が完全にスキップされる可能性があり、プレースホルダー（ロード失敗でエラーが顕在化）より危険な状態です。 `hdkz-dev.github.io` はパブリック GitHub Pages であり、リポジトリ側のデプロイ設定が変わると asset が予告なく差し替えられます。SRI なしではサプライチェーン攻撃に対する防御がゼロになります。 対象アセット（`yaneuraou`, `katago`, `edax`, `mortal`）について、実際に配信されているファイルから SHA-384 ハッシュを計算し `sri` フィールドを追加してください。 以下スクリプトで各 `hdkz-dev.github.io` アセットの SRI ハッシュを計算できます： ```shell #!/bin/bash # Description: Compute SHA-384 SRI hashes for all non-Stockfish engine assets # Requires: curl, openssl URLS=( "https://hdkz-dev.github.io/multi-game-engines/assets/yaneuraou/7.5/yaneuraou.js" "https://hdkz-dev.github.io/multi-game-engines/assets/yaneuraou/7.5/yaneuraou.wasm" "https://hdkz-dev.github.io/multi-game-engines/assets/katago/1.14/katago.js" "https://hdkz-dev.github.io/multi-game-engines/assets/katago/1.14/katago.wasm" "https://hdkz-dev.github.io/multi-game-engines/assets/edax/4.4/edax.js" "https://hdkz-dev.github.io/multi-game-engines/assets/mortal/1.0/mortal.js" ) for url in "${URLS[@]}"; do echo -n "$url => sha384-" curl -fsSL "$url" | openssl dgst -sha384 -binary | openssl base64 -A echo done ``` Based on learnings: SRI hash verification must be enforced for all resource loading operations (`**/*.{ts,tsx}`, `**/{scripts,build,config}/**/*.{ts,js,json}`).
